---
title: "Predicting Customer Conversion in Digital Marketing"
subtitle: "Group Project Presentation"
author: "Group 3: Yushan, Sora, Grace, Sandy, Jungmin"
institute: "IBM 6540 - MSDM - Cal Poly Pomona"
date: today

format:
  revealjs:
    theme: serif
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    footer: Predicting Customer Conversion in Digital Marketing
    transition: slide
    transition-speed: default
    incremental: false
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    slide-number: true
    scrollable: true
    smaller: false
    code-fold: false
    code-overflow: wrap
    number-sections: false
    number-depth: 5
    embed-resources: true
    css: styles.css

editor: visual

execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: auto
---

# Table of Contents

::: incremental
-   Introduction
-   Business Problem
-   Analytics Objective
-   Dataset
-   Sample Characteristics
-   Data Wrangling
-   Analytics Methods
-   Expected Business Value
-   Timeline
-   References
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Introduction

## Background

*Briefly introduce the digital marketing problem.*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Business Problem

## Problem Statement

*Describe the business challenge.*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Analytics Objective

## Objective

*State the primary analytics objective.*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Dataset

## Data Source

Dataset: **Predict Conversion in Digital Marketing Dataset** -Kaggle (Rabie El Kharoua)

## Key Variables

Demographics

Marketing

Customer Engagement

Purchase History

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Sample Characteristics

## Descriptive Statistics

```{r}
# Insert chart or table here
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Data Wrangling

## Preprocessing Steps

-   Handle missing values
-   Remove duplicates
-   Feature engineering
-   Data transformation

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Analytics Methods

## 

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Expected Business Value

## Expected Outcomes

-   Improve customer targeting
-   Increase conversion rates
-   Support marketing decisions

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Timeline

| Phase              | Status |
|--------------------|--------|
| Data Collection    |        |
| Data Cleaning      |        |
| Modeling           |        |
| Evaluation         |        |
| Final Presentation |        |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# References

-   Dataset source
-   Research papers
-   Course materials

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Questions?

Thank you!
